title: Bridge Paper: Insight and the selection of ideas.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.
**Phase context:** predictive coding, Bayesian brain, free energy, active inference, predictive processing

Paper: Insight and the selection of ideas.
DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2023.105363
Abstract: Perhaps it is no accident that insight moments accompany some of humanity's most important discoveries in science, medicine, and art. Here we propose that feelings of insight play a central role in (heuristically) selecting an idea from the stream of consciousness by capturing attention and eliciting a sense of intuitive confidence permitting fast action under uncertainty.
